title: Data Viz — Stats Cards, Sparklines, Donut, Bar Chart, Relative Time, Alert Banners
summary: Defines the implementation contracts for six data-visualisation primitives: Sparkline, MiniDonut, MiniBar, RelativeTime, stats-card compositions, and alert banners. Each component exposes a typed prop surface (dimensions, color tokens, data arrays) and precise SVG/CSS geometry that the system must honour.
